privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
BVisionRY Connect collects and processes the data you provide when creating your profile (name, handle, role, goal, city, country, photo), the messages you send, intros you make, and meetings you propose. We use this data to deliver the core product: matching you with other professionals, delivering messages, and notifying you of events.

We share data only with infrastructure vendors required to operate the service (Supabase for storage, Firebase for push notifications, Sentry for crash reports). We do not sell your data.

You can export all your data at any time from Settings, and you can request full deletion at any time. Deletion is permanent and irreversible.

Questions? Email privacy@bvisionry.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body:
By using BVisionRY Connect, you agree to use the service for lawful professional networking purposes. You will not harass, impersonate, spam, or share inappropriate content. We may suspend or remove accounts that violate these rules.

The service is provided as-is, without warranty. We may change features at any time. We are not liable for any damages arising from use of the service.

Questions? Email legal@bvisionry.com.
